/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/array/two_sum.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/past_questions/utokyo_cs_2022.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/sort/basic_sort.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tests/test_basic_sort.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tests/test_binary_search.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tests/test_dynarray.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tests/test_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tests/test_stack.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tests/test_two_sum.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tree/avl_tree.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/utils/dynarray.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/utils/queue_array.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/utils/queue_list.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/utils/stack.c.o -o main
